zh.lifeSummary: Brita Jönsdotter是Jöns Rasmussen和Else Laursdottir的女兒，出生在芬蘭。她和Rötger Jörgensson至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Brita Jönsdotter是Jöns Rasmussen和Else Laursdottir的女儿，出生在芬兰。她和Rötger Jörgensson至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Brita
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Borrowing of the Irish name Brighid ( see Bridget ). This name owes its enormous popularity in Scandinavia, especially in Sweden, to St Birgitta ( 1304–73 ), patron saint of Sweden. She was a noblewoman who bore her husband eight children. After his death, she founded an order of nuns, the ‘Bridgettines’ or Order of the Most Holy Saviour. She also went to Rome, where she attempted to reform religious life.

variants.name: Britt
meanings: contracted form of Birgit ( see Bridget ), made famous in the English-speaking world by the Swedish actress Britt Ekland ( b. 1942 ; her surname was originally Eklund ).

en.lifeSummary: Brita Jönsdotter was born in Finland as the daughter of Jöns Rasmussen and Else Laursdottir. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Rötger Jörgensson.

fr.lifeSummary: Brita Jönsdotter est née à Finlande, fille de Jöns Rasmussen et Else Laursdottir. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Rötger Jörgensson.

de.lifeSummary: Brita Jönsdotter wurde in Finnland, als Tochter von Jöns Rasmussen und Else Laursdottir geboren. Sie hatte mit Rötger Jörgensson mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Brita Jönsdotter è nata il nel Finlandia come figlia di Jöns Rasmussen e Else Laursdottir. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Rötger Jörgensson.

ja.lifeSummary: Brita JönsdotterはフィンランドでJöns RasmussenとElse Laursdottirの娘として生まれた。彼女はRötger Jörgenssonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Brita Jönsdotter(은)는 핀란드에서 Jöns Rasmussen(와)과 Else Laursdottir의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Rötger Jörgensson(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Brita Jönsdotter nasceu em Finlândia filha de Jöns Rasmussen e Else Laursdottir. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Rötger Jörgensson.

ru.lifeSummary: Brita Jönsdotter родилась в местности Финляндия. Её родителей звали Jöns Rasmussen и Else Laursdottir. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Rötger Jörgensson.

es.lifeSummary: Brita Jönsdotter nació en Finlandia como hija de Jöns Rasmussen y Else Laursdottir. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Rötger Jörgensson.
